(first admin, e-mail unverified)

span.p:
purge job, daily 03:30
after 30-day retention
(ShedLock-guarded, flag-gated)

span.p:
Temporary lockout is ORTHOGONAL to status:
5 failed logins set is_locked + locked_until
(+15 min) and logins answer HTTP 423;
the lock auto-clears after the window.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Soft delete = UPDATE, never DELETE FROM users
(DB trigger forbids hard deletes).
Reads exclude deleted rows via SQL restriction
"deleted_at IS NULL".
